Operation 'searchAhead' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Search Ahead (Predictive)' is generic and doesn't clearly indicate the action. Description lacks critical details about inputs (search query, geographic parameters), outputs (suggestion list format), and use cases. Enhanced version specifies the search query parameter, geographic bias options, return value structure, and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to invoke this operation for location-based autocomplete scenarios.

data.current_description: Spatially-aware predictive search engine for type-ahead functionality.
data.summary_suggestion: Get predictive search suggestions for locations
data.description_suggestion: Performs spatially-aware predictive search to provide type-ahead suggestions as users enter search queries. Accepts a partial search string and optional geographic bias parameters (latitude, longitude, radius) to return location-based predictions. Returns a list of matching place suggestions ranked by relevance and proximity. Useful for autocomplete interfaces and location discovery.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Search Ahead (Predictive)' is generic and doesn't clearly indicate the action. Description lacks critical details about inputs (search query, geographic parameters), outputs (suggestion list format), and use cases. Enhanced version specifies the search query parameter, geographic bias options, return value structure, and practical use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to invoke this operation for location-based autocomplete scenarios.

data.current_description: Convert a street address to geographic coordinates using POST method.
data.description_suggestion: Convert a street address to geographic coordinates (latitude/longitude) using POST method. Accepts address data in request body supporting single-line and 5-box input formats. Returns a GeocodeResponse object containing the matched location coordinates and address details.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks parity with GET endpoint. Added details about input formats, request body structure, and response schema to match the GET version and improve AI agent understanding of what data to send and what to expect.

data.current_description: Convert a latitude/longitude pair to a street address using POST.

data.reasoning: Description lacks parity with GET endpoint and missing details about request body structure and response schema. Added specifics about input format and response object to improve AI agent understanding and consistency with the GET version.

data.current_description: Geocode up to 100 addresses in a single POST request.
data.description_suggestion: Geocode up to 100 addresses in a single POST request. Accepts an array of addresses in the request body. Returns a batch response containing geocoding results for each address including coordinates, matched locations, and any errors encountered.

data.current_description: Calculate a route between two or more locations with turn-by-turn narrative, distance, and time.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate route with directions and metrics
data.description_suggestion: Calculate an optimal route between two or more locations. Returns turn-by-turn directions (maneuvers), total distance, estimated travel time, and route geometry. Supports multiple waypoints and routing options. Response includes detailed leg information and navigation instructions for each segment of the journey.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic ('Get Route'). Description mentions what is returned but lacks clarity on inputs (multiple locations/waypoints), routing behavior (optimal route selection), and complete response structure. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and description to clarify input requirements, routing logic, and comprehensive output details for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Calculate a route using POST method for complex requests.
data.description_suggestion: Calculate a route between locations using the POST method, which supports complex requests with multiple waypoints, detailed routing options, and advanced parameters. data.current_description: Calculate an optimized route that reorders waypoints for the most efficient path.
data.description_suggestion: Calculate an optimized route that reorders multiple waypoints to determine the most efficient path. Useful for multi-stop route planning and delivery optimization.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve multiple alternative routes between two locations with different characteristics (fastest, shortest, scenic). data.current_description: Calculate distances and times between multiple locations in a matrix.
data.description_suggestion: Calculate distances and travel times between multiple origin and destination locations in a matrix format. Accepts a request body with arrays of origins and destinations and returns a RouteMatrixResponse containing a matrix of distances and times for all origin-destination pairs. Useful for analyzing accessibility, service area coverage, and multi-location optimization problems.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. data.current_description: Retrieve the shape/geometry of a previously computed route.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the geometric shape/coordinates of a previously computed route. Accepts route identifiers or session parameters and returns a RouteShapeResponse containing the route's coordinate sequence (latitude/longitude points) that define the path. Useful for rendering routes on maps or analyzing route geometry without recalculating the full route.

data.current_description: Generate a static map image with optional locations, routes, and overlays.
data.description_suggestion: Generate a static map image with customizable locations, routes, and visual overlays. Accepts parameters for center coordinates, zoom level, size, and optional markers, routes, and overlays. Returns a map image (PNG/JPG) that can be embedded in web pages or applications. data.current_description: Spatially-aware predictive search engine for type-ahead functionality.
data.summary_suggestion: Get predictive search suggestions for locations
data.description_suggestion: Performs spatially-aware predictive search to provide type-ahead suggestions as users enter search queries. Accepts a partial search string and optional geographic bias parameters (latitude, longitude, radius) to return location-based predictions. Returns a list of matching place suggestions ranked by relevance and proximity. Useful for autocomplete interfaces and location discovery.
